channel.title: Projects on Chau Ta
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Chau Ta

item.title: Distributed Neural Network
item.description: A distributed neural network training system utilizing an elastic, fault-tolerant Parameter Server architecture over gRPC.

item.title: FlightBowl
item.description: A flight booking and management system for the Notre Dame Marching Band, coordinating travel for football bowl games and managing group flight logistics.

item.title: Underwater Fish Tracker
item.description: A MATLAB-based motion tracking pipeline using edge detection, contrast enhancement, and blob analysis to track fish behaviors through underwater obstructions.

item.title: Bluetooth Low Energy Scanner
item.description: Android app that scans nearby BLE devices, displays RSSI strength, supports background scanning, and notifies users when beacons are in range.
